title: Statistics — Midterm Review
description: Flagship stats: probability, Bayes, CI/hypothesis testing, exam checklist.

blocks.title: Bayes terms
blocks.markdown:
| Term | Meaning |
|------|--------|
| P(H) | Prior |
| P(D\|H) | Likelihood |
| P(H\|D) | Posterior |
| P(D) | Evidence / marginal |

blocks.title: Decision rules
blocks.markdown:
| Approach | Reject H0 if |
|----------|--------------|
| p-value | p ≤ α |
| Critical | |stat| ≥ critical |
| CI | μ0 outside CI (two-sided) |

blocks.title: Test workflow
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[State H0 / Ha] --> B[Choose α and test]
  B --> C[Compute statistic]
  C --> D[p-value or critical]
  D --> E{Reject H0?}
  E -->|Yes| F[Significant at α]
  E -->|No| G[Fail to reject]
  F --> H[Context sentence]
  G --> H

blocks.title: Exam tips
blocks.markdown:
| Pitfall | Fix |
|---------|-----|
| p vs α | Compare carefully |
| One vs two sided | Match Ha |
| σ vs s | z vs t |
| Independent samples | Check design |
